research.name: Axehammer
research.description: Buildings cost 5 less wood, but your workers curse you for having to chop down the trees themselves.

research.name: Optimized Construction
research.description: Buildings cost 10 less planks, and your inhabitants hope it doesn't get too windy.

research.name: Pig Ranch
research.description: Is 4 times as effective as the piggery, but needs more space.

research.name: Sawmill
research.description: Saws double the amount of wood as the saw works, and yields more planks from the same amount of wood, but needs a river build spot.

research.name: Arboretum
research.description: Plants new trees in forest spaces with fewer than three trees.

research.name: Storage Expansion
research.description: Expands the island storage by 50.

research.name: Garrison Expansion
research.description: Expands the garrison limit by 20.

research.name: Sprouting Touch
research.description: Automatically replants trees chopped by hand.

research.name: Echoing Touch
research.description: Each tap is now counted as double.

research.name: Aquatic Touch Technique
research.description: You can now fish by hand, and might find random flotsam.

research.name: War Drums
research.description: All future battles are 10 minutes shorter.

research.name: Bannerman
research.description: You can assign 10 additional units to a battle.

research.name: Village Fair
research.description: You receive once-only 30 militias.

research.name: Vanguard
research.description: Each newly discovered island will be equipped with militia up to the garrison limit.

research.name: Squire
research.description: With a hastily assembled wooden shield, this unit is remarkably resistant to ranged attacks.

research.name: Better Relations
research.description: You can discover one more island.

research.name: Bigger Islands
research.description: Increases the maximum island size by 2.

research.name: Exploration (requires Phoenix from the Ashes)
research.description: You receive once-only 1 cartography.

research.name: Outpost
research.description: Each newly discovered island will start with a garrison equal to the Kontor tier.

research.name: Clearing
research.description: You get the free cartography option to clear a newly discovered island of all trees.

research.name: Better Spyglasses
research.description: All island discoveries are completed 35% faster.

research.name: Improved Sails
research.description: All ships are 10% faster within a region.

research.name: Phoenix from the Ashes
research.description: You will receive once-only a small flagship.

research.name: Efficient Stacking (requires Phoenix from the Ashes)
research.description: Your small flagships can now carry twice the amount of cargo.

research.name: Streamlined Hull (requires Phoenix from the Ashes)
research.description: Your small flagships' travel time is reduced by 33% within a region.

research.name: Optimized Accounting
research.description: All your inhabitants pay 5% more taxes.

research.name: Slack Time
research.description: Your pioneers generate 10% more creativity.

research.name: Cistern
research.description: Provides fresh water to houses in a large area.

research.name: Labor Camp
research.description: You can trade in your militias for a selection of basic building materials here every 8 hours.

research.name: Psychological Persuasion
research.description: Your pioneers provide 20% more militias.

research.name: Wage Optimization
research.description: Buildings cost 5 fewer coins.

research.description: Buildings cost 10 less limestone.

research.name: Flour Windmill
research.description: Grinds wheat into flour. Has the same efficiency, but doesn't need a river build spot.

research.name: Rickyard
research.description: Consumes wheat to double the yield at all nearby ranches.

research.name: Textile Factory
research.description: Processes yarn into fabric. Produces more fabric from less yarn, but needs a river build spot.
